codeReview.summary: Pairing start/confirm/refresh endpoints, bearer-token auth enforcement, and expiry handling align with the feature spec and are backed by dedicated tests; no blocking issues found.

sharedStateObservations.observation: API contracts reference is missing the new token refresh endpoint introduced by this feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/hunter/Documents/GitHub/orchestra/.factory/library/api-contracts.md lists /api/pair/start and /api/pair/confirm but not /api/pair/refresh; implemented at packages/mobile-gateway/src/test-server.ts (route /api/pair/refresh).

sharedStateObservations.observation: User testing guidance still claims any Bearer token works; auth now only accepts issued tokens or the legacy test token.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/hunter/Documents/GitHub/orchestra/.factory/library/user-testing.md: 'Auth token: Any string works as Bearer token' vs requireAuth in packages/mobile-gateway/src/test-server.ts which checks accessTokens and only seeds 'test-token'.

summary: Reviewed gateway-pairing-auth implementation and tests; behavior matches expected pairing/token auth flow with no blocking issues. Noted two documentation gaps in shared state references.
